title: Lodestone Redstone
description: Adds wireless redstone using levers, lodestones and compasses!
body:
## Adds wireless redstone using levers, lodestones, and compasses!



Simply place a lodestone, place a lever on it, then link up a compass to it and you'll be on your way.

![Syncing a compass to a lodestone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e71a3c78f5925756c4fbb4a32453f94cb9723147.gif)

From there, either right click while holding the compass to toggle the lever, or you can instead place the compass in an item frame and power/depower it (every time the power going into the item frame changes, the state of the lever will change).

![Using a placed compass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbf2ac268845a008ea2f396f27fe335118279c01.gif)

These have unlimited range, load chunks, and work across dimensions - no matter where you are, you can send (and lodestones can recieve) signals. (note: does not work with custom dimensions, only the vanilla 3)

![Travelling from nether to overworld](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51e82e3e98b107e68c1bc985aacc4caa9e9db923.gif)

Alternatively, right click with an unbound compass from a distance to toggle any lodestones you're pointing at (within 200 blocks).

![Using an unbound compass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b55d3f6bb1b0801b87b150f386fa061c28b844c.gif)

From traps to stasis chambers to fireworks, go wild and have fun!

![Using remotes and placed compasses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5bf48f6852d4f8b41df519b2e751629c48eefdd.gif)
